subject: feat(ux): comprehensive mobile UX and accessibility improvements
body:
18 fixes across the builder, renderer, and dashboard:

- Touch targets: Increase button padding to 44px min on mobile (BuilderCanvas,
  PageTabs, ConditionBuilder)
- Page rename: Add pencil icon tap target — double-click is not discoverable
  on touch devices
- Safe areas: Add env(safe-area-inset-bottom) for iPhone notch/home indicator
  on BottomSheet and FAB
- Submit UX: Add spinner animation, retry button on failure, "Submit another"
  CTA on success screen
- Error display: Prominent save-failure banner instead of small red text,
  submit errors include retry action
- Jargon removal: Replace "Field key" and URL parameter hint with plain
  language, remove debug field ID
- Loading states: Skeleton cards on form list, spinner on all loading screens
- FAB: Add "Add field" label next to icon for discoverability
- Bottom sheet: Swipe-down-to-dismiss gesture via touch tracking on handle
- Page tabs: Scroll indicator fade when tabs overflow, ARIA role=tablist/tab
- iOS Safari: Try/catch scrollIntoView smooth for older Safari versions
- PWA: Offline fallback page (offline.html) served by workbox on network fail
- Code splitting: Lazy-load all route pages via React.lazy + Suspense
- Number inputs: Add inputMode="numeric" for mobile number keyboards
- Accessibility: scope="col" on table headers, role="dialog" on EmbedCodeDialog,
  aria-selected on page tabs
- Validation: More specific phone error message ("at least 7 digits")

Tags: ux, mobile, accessibility, pwa, performance
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-friendly-builder
Semver: minor
